form.formComment: First look at this trip and drops in distance on last start. Should be around the mark.

form.formComment: Consistent performer who is new here. Nice win last start easily by 7 lengths at Townsville (21.56) beating Exotic Ruby in a Grade 5 on March 31. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Consistent performer who is new here. Nice win last start easily by 7 lengths at Townsville (21.56) beating Exotic Ruby in a Grade 5 on March 31. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 2 lengths in 24.27, beating Boonie's Mate. Last start finished 6th on April 1 over 407m at this track behind Mr. Williams beaten 11 lengths (24.74) in a Grade 5. Hard to envisage a win.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 6 lengths at this track over 407m (23.72) beating Pookie Bear in Grade 6 on March 29. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fifth over 407m at this track. Can't recommend against this lot.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked and fell turning off back straight.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 407m at this track. That followed a win two back in 23.70 beating Farmor Rogue over 407m at this track. Hit the frame last time but will need to improve further.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh over 407m at this track, beaten 12 lengths (24.34) behind Quick Shot in a Grade 4 on April 1. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished 5th on April 1 over 510m at this track behind Quest For Pace beaten 6 lengths (30.56) in a OPEN. Must be included.

form.formComment: Last start finished last over 407m at this track beaten 11 lengths (24.78) behind Mr. Williams in a Grade 5 on April 1. Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.
